llm_response:
The journey begins in the first month with a focus on establishing a solid financial foundation and securing the ideal venue. The couple must create a detailed budget that allocates funds wisely across all categories, ensuring no expense is overlooked. Simultaneously, they should start the process of selecting a venue that fits their style and capacity requirements, as this decision will heavily influence the rest of the planning.

In the second month, the primary task shifts to finalizing the guest list and sending out initial save-the-date cards. With the venue already chosen, the couple can now accurately estimate headcount numbers to help refine their budget further. They must also begin drafting invitations that reflect the tone of their special day while adhering to the financial constraints set in the previous month.

By the third month, the focus turns to booking key vendors such as the photographer, caterer, and florist. The couple needs to coordinate with these professionals to ensure their services align with the chosen venue's policies and the overall theme. This is also the time to start discussing specific menu options and dietary restrictions with the catering team to avoid any last-minute complications.

The fourth month is dedicated to creating a comprehensive timeline for the wedding day and confirming all vendor contracts. The couple should review the schedule with their planners to ensure every detail is accounted for, from the ceremony to the reception. They must also finalize the seating chart based on the guest list and ensure everyone feels included and comfortable on their big day.

In the fifth month, the couple should handle the remaining logistical details, such as purchasing attire, arranging transportation, and confirming all final touches with the vendors. It is crucial to double-check that all deposits have been made and that all contracts are signed and in order. This month is about ensuring that everything is ready and that there are no surprises on the wedding day.

The final month before the wedding is for a final walkthrough of the venue and a last-minute review of all tasks. The couple should confirm the guest list one last time and ensure that all invitations have been delivered. We are excited to plan this wedding together, and with careful preparation, the day will be a memorable celebration of their love.
